D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

Uniform Grid Quantization — n³ Palette

Divide each RGB channel into n levels giving an n³ palette; simplest quantizer, used by 8-bit indexed colour (216-colour web-safe palette = 6³)

Web-safe palette (1996 Netscape) = uniform 6×6×6 = 216 colours, leaving 40 system entries. Posterisation artifact is severe in gradients but fast and dictionary-free. Modern variants use perceptually weighted spacing in Lab to reduce visible banding.

Slide levels-per-channel.
